steps.title: Recognize the triangle is isosceles
steps.content: We're given $AB = 4{,}680\text{ mm}$ and $BC = 4{,}680\text{ mm}$. Since two sides are equal, triangle $ABC$ is isosceles.

steps.title: Apply the definition of equilateral
steps.content: An equilateral triangle has all three sides equal in length. Since $AB = BC = 4{,}680\text{ mm}$, we need $AC = 4{,}680\text{ mm}$ for the triangle to be equilateral. Choice A provides exactly this: $AC = 4{,}680\text{ mm}$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
